title: Fringe At Falmer 2026
description: SAT 2, 5.30-6.15:RACHEL SMITH, FLUTE:A min Partita, Ibert: Pièce, Honnegar:Danse de la chèvre, Debussy:Syrinx Sunday 10 May, 3-3.45 BEATRICE SALES, VIOLIN, ANDREW BIGGS, PIANO Beethoven:Son. Op.12, no.1 in D; Suk:4 pieces, Op.17:2&3, Tchaikovsky:Op.42, Melody & Scherzo, Boulanger:Deux Morceaux SAT 16, 5.30-6.15:JANE HAUGHTON, MEZZO, BEATRICE SALES, VIOLA, ROSEMARY COLE, PIANO: Brahms Op.91 (Lullaby, Longing), Strauss: Morgen, Frank Bridge:3 Songs, Chaminade, songs SUN 17, 3-3.45:THE BOTHY SINGERS, dir. LUCY PICKERING: The Beatles, Burt Bacharach, Labi Siffre SAT 23, 5.30-6.15: BRIGHTON GUITAR 4tet: Spin,York, The Swan, arr.Baker, Habanera, arr. Spolding, Merry Christmas Mr. Laurence, arr. Hopkins, Tocatta, Leo Brouwer, Away to New Zealand, Lindsey-Clark SAT 30, 5.30-6.15:BELLADONA (SUE MILEHAM, SOP, JANE PLESSNER, CLARINET, NICOLA GRUNBERG, PIANO): Lachner:Auf Flügeln des Gesanges, Reade:A Kitchen Garden, Cooke:Songs of Innocence, Mozart:Voi, che sapete, Dvořák:Song to the Moon

venue.name: St. Laurence Church by the Pond
